title: epipactis monorchis
intro: Epipactis monorchis, also known as the monkey orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Epipactis monorchis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Epipactis monorchis can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional due to potential interactions or side effects.
